description: Using ESA SNAP Desktop, calculate the sub-pixel fractional abundance of Vegetation, Water, and Soil for the image 'landsat_multispectral.tif' located at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Use the Linear Spectral Unmixing tool with three endmembers: 'Vegetation' (band_1: 50, band_2: 120, band_3: 15, band_4: 25), 'Water' (band_1: 5, band_2: 10, band_3: 20, band_4: 30), and 'Soil' (band_1: 90, band_2: 70, band_3: 60, band_4: 50). Save the resulting product in BEAM-DIMAP format to '~/snap_exports/fractional_cover.dim' and export it as a GeoTIFF to '~/snap_exports/fractional_cover.tif'. The built-in Spectral Unmixing tool must be used to ensure parameters are preserved in the metadata for data provenance.
